title: Video Stitching
hints: Sort clips by start time to process them in chronological order, focusing on extending coverage from the current end of the covered range.
Use a greedy approach: at each step, among all clips that start before or at the current coverage end, pick the one that reaches the furthest.
If the furthest reachable point does not exceed the current end, coverage is broken; otherwise, update the end and increment the clip count.
